# this is the build file for project tmc
# it is autogenerated by the xmake build system.
# do not edit by hand.

# project
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.15.0)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0091 NEW)
project(tmc VERSION 0.1.2 LANGUAGES CXX C)
set(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID ${CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID})

# target
add_executable(agb2mid "")
set_target_properties(agb2mid PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "agb2mid")
set_target_properties(agb2mid PROPERTIES RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/tools/bin")
target_include_directories(agb2mid PRIVATE
    tools/src/agb2mid
)
target_compile_options(agb2mid PRIVATE
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-m64>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-m64>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CUDA>:-G>
)
set_target_properties(agb2mid PROPERTIES CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(agb2mid PRIVATE cxx_std_17)
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(agb2mid PRIVATE $<$<CONFIG:Debug>:-Od>)
else()
    target_compile_options(agb2mid PRIVATE -O0)
endif()
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(agb2mid PRIVATE -Zi)
else()
    target_compile_options(agb2mid PRIVATE -g)
endif()
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    set_property(TARGET agb2mid PROPERTY
        MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY "MultiThreaded$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:Debug>")
endif()
target_link_options(agb2mid PRIVATE
    -m64
    -static
    -static-libgcc
    -static-libstdc++
)
# private sourcefiles from sourcebatch c++.build for target agb2mid
target_sources(agb2mid PRIVATE 
    tools/src/agb2mid/agb.cpp
    tools/src/agb2mid/error.cpp
    tools/src/agb2mid/main.cpp
    tools/src/agb2mid/midi.cpp
    tools/src/agb2mid/tables.cpp
)

    -m64
    -static
    -static-libgcc
)

    tools/src/aif2pcm/extended.c
    tools/src/aif2pcm/main.c
)

# target
add_executable(asset_extractor "")
set_target_properties(asset_extractor PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "asset_extractor")
set_target_properties(asset_extractor PROPERTIES RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/build/pc")
target_include_directories(asset_extractor PRIVATE
    tools/src/assets_extractor
    include
    port
    .
)
target_include_directories(asset_extractor SYSTEM PRIVATE
    C:/Users/mathe/AppData/Local/.xmake/packages/n/nlohmann_json/v3.12.0/942e578ec9634b1c912e6e1a23434b35/include
)
target_compile_definitions(asset_extractor PRIVATE
    PC_PORT
    NON_MATCHING
    USA
    ENGLISH
    REVISION=0
)
target_compile_options(asset_extractor PRIVATE
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-m64>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-m64>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CUDA>:-G>
)
set_target_properties(asset_extractor PROPERTIES CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(asset_extractor PRIVATE cxx_std_17)
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(asset_extractor PRIVATE $<$<CONFIG:Debug>:-Od>)
else()
    target_compile_options(asset_extractor PRIVATE -O0)
endif()
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(asset_extractor PRIVATE -Zi)
else()
    target_compile_options(asset_extractor PRIVATE -g)
endif()
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    set_property(TARGET asset_extractor PROPERTY
        MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY "MultiThreaded$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:Debug>")
endif()
target_link_options(asset_extractor PRIVATE
    -m64
    -static
    -static-libgcc
    -static-libstdc++
)
# private sourcefiles from sourcebatch c++.build for target asset_extractor

    tools/src/assets_extractor/assets_extractor_main.cpp
    tools/src/assets_extractor/asset_extractor_runner.cpp
    port/port_asset_pipeline.cpp
)
# private sourcefiles from sourcebatch c.build for target asset_extractor
target_sources(asset_extractor PRIVATE 
    port/port_asset_index.c
)

    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CUDA>:-G>
)

    target_compile_options(mid2agb PRIVATE $<$<CONFIG:Debug>:-Od>)

    target_compile_options(mid2agb PRIVATE -Zi)

set_target_properties(preproc PROPERTIES RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/tools/bin")
target_include_directories(preproc PRIVATE
    tools/src/preproc
)
target_compile_options(preproc PRIVATE
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-m64>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-m64>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CUDA>:-G>
)
set_target_properties(preproc PROPERTIES CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(preproc PRIVATE cxx_std_17)
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(preproc PRIVATE $<$<CONFIG:Debug>:-Od>)
else()
    target_compile_options(preproc PRIVATE -O0)
endif()
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(preproc PRIVATE -Zi)
else()
    target_compile_options(preproc PRIVATE -g)
endif()
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    set_property(TARGET preproc PROPERTY
        MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY "MultiThreaded$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:Debug>")
endif()
target_link_options(preproc PRIVATE
    -m64
    -static
    -static-libgcc
    -static-libstdc++
)

    tools/src/preproc/string_parser.cpp
    tools/src/preproc/utf8.cpp
)

    tools/src/scaninc
)

)
target_compile_definitions(scaninc PRIVATE
    FMT_HEADER_ONLY=1
)
target_compile_options(scaninc PRIVATE
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-m64>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-m64>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CUDA>:-G>
)
set_target_properties(scaninc PROPERTIES CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(scaninc PRIVATE cxx_std_17)
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(scaninc PRIVATE $<$<CONFIG:Debug>:-Od>)
else()
    target_compile_options(scaninc PRIVATE -O0)
endif()
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(scaninc PRIVATE -Zi)
else()
    target_compile_options(scaninc PRIVATE -g)
endif()
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    set_property(TARGET scaninc PROPERTY
        MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY "MultiThreaded$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:Debug>")
endif()

    -m64
    -static
    -static-libgcc
    -static-libstdc++
)

    tools/src/scaninc/asm_file.cpp
    tools/src/scaninc/c_file.cpp

)

# target
add_executable(tmc_pc "")
set_target_properties(tmc_pc PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "tmc_pc")
set_target_properties(tmc_pc PROPERTIES RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/build/pc")
add_dependencies(tmc_pc asset_extractor)
target_include_directories(tmc_pc PRIVATE
    include
    libs
    port
    .
    build/USA
    libs/ViruaPPU/include
    libs/VirtuaAPU/include
    libs/agbplay_core
    tools/src/assets_extractor
)
target_include_directories(tmc_pc SYSTEM PRIVATE
    C:/Users/mathe/AppData/Local/.xmake/packages/l/libsdl3/3.4.0/ce43b08bf43a4a3aa7eef4fceccb62b1/include
    C:/Users/mathe/AppData/Local/.xmake/packages/o/opengl-headers/2024.01.04/5f1921e4548f4e3281b47e446c75eef6/include
    C:/Users/mathe/AppData/Local/.xmake/packages/e/egl-headers/2023.12.16/e3ae36f980e04623ad0128663b6234b0/include
    C:/Users/mathe/AppData/Local/.xmake/packages/n/nlohmann_json/v3.12.0/942e578ec9634b1c912e6e1a23434b35/include
)
target_compile_definitions(tmc_pc PRIVATE
    PC_PORT
    NON_MATCHING
    USE_OPENMP
    USA
    ENGLISH
    REVISION=0
    USE_AVX2
)
target_compile_options(tmc_pc PRIVATE
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-Wall>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-Wextra>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-Wno-unused-parameter>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-Wno-missing-field-initializers>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-fno-strict-aliasing>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-fwrapv>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-fno-strict-overflow>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-O0>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-g>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-m64>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-m64>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-Wall>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-Wextra>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-Wno-unused-parameter>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-fno-strict-aliasing>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-fwrapv>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-fno-strict-overflow>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-O3>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-g>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CUDA>:-G>
)
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "GNU")
target_compile_options(tmc_pc PRIVATE
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-mavx2>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-mfma>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-fopenmp>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-mavx2>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-mfma>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-fopenmp>
)
endif()
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
target_compile_options(tmc_pc PRIVATE
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:/arch:AVX2>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:/arch:AVX2>
)
endif()
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "Clang")
target_compile_options(tmc_pc PRIVATE
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-mavx2>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-mfma>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-fopenmp>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-mavx2>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-mfma>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-fopenmp>
)
endif()
set_target_properties(tmc_pc PROPERTIES C_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(tmc_pc PRIVATE c_std_11)
set_target_properties(tmc_pc PROPERTIES CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(tmc_pc PRIVATE cxx_std_20)
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(tmc_pc PRIVATE $<$<CONFIG:Debug>:-Od>)
else()
    target_compile_options(tmc_pc PRIVATE -O0)
endif()
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(tmc_pc PRIVATE -Zi)
else()
    target_compile_options(tmc_pc PRIVATE -g)
endif()
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    set_property(TARGET tmc_pc PROPERTY
        MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY "MultiThreaded$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:Debug>")
endif()
target_link_libraries(tmc_pc PRIVATE
    SDL3
    gomp
    winhttp
    winpthread
    user32
    gdi32
    winmm
    imm32
    ole32
    oleaut32
    version
    uuid
    advapi32
    setupapi
    shell32
)
target_link_directories(tmc_pc PRIVATE
    C:/Users/mathe/AppData/Local/.xmake/packages/l/libsdl3/3.4.0/ce43b08bf43a4a3aa7eef4fceccb62b1/lib
)
target_link_options(tmc_pc PRIVATE
    -m64
    -static
    -static-libgcc
    -static-libstdc++
)
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "GNU")
target_link_options(tmc_pc PRIVATE
    -fopenmp
)
endif()
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "Clang")
target_link_options(tmc_pc PRIVATE
    -fopenmp
)
endif()
# private sourcefiles from sourcebatch c++.build for target tmc_pc
target_sources(tmc_pc PRIVATE 
    port/port_runtime_config.cpp
    port/port_asset_bootstrap.cpp
    port/port_asset_loader.cpp
    port/port_asset_pipeline.cpp
    port/port_m4a_backend.cpp
    tools/src/assets_extractor/asset_extractor_runner.cpp
    port/port_ppu.cpp
    libs/agbplay_core/CGBPatterns.cpp
    libs/agbplay_core/Debug.cpp
    libs/agbplay_core/LoudnessCalculator.cpp
    libs/agbplay_core/MP2KChn.cpp
    libs/agbplay_core/MP2KChnPCM.cpp
    libs/agbplay_core/MP2KChnPSG.cpp
    libs/agbplay_core/MP2KContext.cpp
    libs/agbplay_core/MP2KPlayer.cpp
    libs/agbplay_core/MP2KTrack.cpp
    libs/agbplay_core/Resampler.cpp
    libs/agbplay_core/ReverbEffect.cpp
    libs/agbplay_core/Rom.cpp
    libs/agbplay_core/SequenceReader.cpp
    libs/agbplay_core/SoundMixer.cpp
    libs/agbplay_core/Types.cpp
    libs/agbplay_core/Xcept.cpp
)

    src/cutscene.c
    src/backgroundAnimations.c
    src/beanstalkSubtask.c
    src/enterPortalSubtask.c
    src/gameOverTask.c
    src/gameUtils.c
    src/gameData.c
    src/kinstone.c
    src/droptables.c
    src/demo.c
    src/debug.c
    src/flagDebug.c
    src/staffroll.c
    src/menu/figurineMenu.c
    src/menu/kinstoneMenu.c
    src/menu/pauseMenu.c
    src/menu/pauseMenuScreen6.c
    src/data/figurineMenuData.c
    src/data/hitbox.c
    src/data/areaMetadata.c
    src/data/caveBorderMapData.c
    src/data/data_080046A4.c
    src/data/mapActTileToSurfaceType.c
    src/data/objPalettes.c
    src/data/screenTransitions.c
    src/data/transitions.c
    src/worldEvent/worldEvent0.c
    src/worldEvent/worldEvent1.c
    src/worldEvent/worldEvent10.c
    src/worldEvent/worldEvent11.c
    src/worldEvent/worldEvent12.c
    src/worldEvent/worldEvent13.c
    src/worldEvent/worldEvent14.c
    src/worldEvent/worldEvent15.c
    src/worldEvent/worldEvent16.c
    src/worldEvent/worldEvent17.c
    src/worldEvent/worldEvent19.c
    src/worldEvent/worldEvent2.c
    src/worldEvent/worldEvent20.c
    src/worldEvent/worldEvent21.c
    src/worldEvent/worldEvent22.c
    src/worldEvent/worldEvent23.c
    src/worldEvent/worldEvent24.c
    src/worldEvent/worldEvent25.c
    src/worldEvent/worldEvent3.c
    src/worldEvent/worldEvent4.c
    src/worldEvent/worldEvent5.c
    src/worldEvent/worldEvent6.c
    src/worldEvent/worldEvent7.c
    src/worldEvent/worldEvent8.c
    src/worldEvent/worldEvent9.c
    src/code_08049CD4.c
    src/code_08049DF4.c
    src/code_0805EC04.c
)

# target
add_executable(tmc_strings "")
set_target_properties(tmc_strings PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "tmc_strings")
set_target_properties(tmc_strings PROPERTIES RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/tools/bin")
target_include_directories(tmc_strings PRIVATE
    tools/src/tmc_strings
)
target_include_directories(tmc_strings SYSTEM PRIVATE
    C:/Users/mathe/AppData/Local/.xmake/packages/n/nlohmann_json/v3.12.0/942e578ec9634b1c912e6e1a23434b35/include
    C:/Users/mathe/AppData/Local/.xmake/packages/f/fmt/12.1.0/d2855c67babc4580a2b2576a2c7d05fc/include
)
target_compile_definitions(tmc_strings PRIVATE
    FMT_HEADER_ONLY=1
)
target_compile_options(tmc_strings PRIVATE
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-m64>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-m64>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CUDA>:-G>
)
set_target_properties(tmc_strings PROPERTIES CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(tmc_strings PRIVATE cxx_std_17)
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(tmc_strings PRIVATE $<$<CONFIG:Debug>:-Od>)
else()
    target_compile_options(tmc_strings PRIVATE -O0)
endif()
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(tmc_strings PRIVATE -Zi)
else()
    target_compile_options(tmc_strings PRIVATE -g)
endif()
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    set_property(TARGET tmc_strings PROPERTY
        MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY "MultiThreaded$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:Debug>")
endif()
target_link_options(tmc_strings PRIVATE
    -m64
    -static
    -static-libgcc
    -static-libstdc++
)
# private sourcefiles from sourcebatch c++.build for target tmc_strings
target_sources(tmc_strings PRIVATE 
    tools/src/tmc_strings/main.cpp
)

# target
add_custom_target(tools DEPENDS agb2mid aif2pcm asset_processor asset_extractor bin2c gbafix gbagfx mid2agb preproc scaninc tmc_strings)
